description: Ambiguous first-name reference when two Michaels exist; must emit the entity with person_name signal only and confidence 0.5, letting the resolver decide.

template_vars.Body:
From: nazz@wuphf.local
Date: 2026-04-18T09:30:00Z

Michael said yesterday that the new eval harness should ship before the pilot. He wants a recall number by Friday.

expected.notes: Guards Section 10.1 rule 7 + anti-pattern 5: when name is ambiguous and two known candidates exist, emit person_name only at confidence 0.5; do NOT pick a slug.
